alkylation reagent: alkylated (400 mM iodoacetamide in PBS, 30 min, RT, in dark)
alkylation concentration: alkylated (400 mM iodoacetamide in PBS, 30 min, RT, in dark)
cleavage agent: Samples were subjected to tryptic digest [2 µg of procine trypsin in 200 µL 100 mM TEAB (pH 8.5), 1 mM CaCl2, O/N, 37 °C, shaking]
enrichment method: Samples were enriched on prewashed streptavidin-agarose beads (1.5 h, RT, rotating)
labeling: combined with respective TMT10plex™ Isobaric Label (Thermo Scientific, 90110) (1 h, 37 °C, occasional vortex)
reduction reagent: reduced (200 mM tris(2-carboxyethyl)phosphine hydrochloride (TCEP) and 600 mM K2CO3 in PBS, 30 min, 37 °C shaking)
reduction concentration: reduced (200 mM tris(2-carboxyethyl)phosphine hydrochloride (TCEP) and 600 mM K2CO3 in PBS, 30 min, 37 °C shaking)
